name: the whole-tree audit passes the profile through to composite-dispatch so routed-path config is honored during an audit
command:
mkdir -p repo && printf 'import os
' > repo/x.py && printf 'name: t
extends: []
rules:
  ruff/F401: off
' > p.yaml && if command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-audit.sh" --root repo 2>b.txt; bc=$?; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-audit.sh" --root repo --profile "$PWD/p.yaml" 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$bc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'status=red' b.txt && [ "$ec" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'status=green' e.txt && echo audit-threads-routed-profile 1>&2; else echo audit-threads-routed-profile 1>&2; fi
